ddls:
CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., microchip, integrated circuit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., TSOP, FBGA, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Input capacitance: CLK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the parameter (e.g., C, L1, L2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., pF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or descriptions associated with the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "component_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "component_parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component parameter */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or descriptions associated with the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_parameter_id") REFERENCES component_parameters ("component_parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each component type
Type of component (e.g., microchip, integrated circuit)
Unique identifier for each package type
